channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Construction barrier obstructing pavement and road, 30th March
item.description:
Collapsed yellow site barrier at the entrance to the Beechbrook construction site, obstructing the pavement and partly protruding into the road. Photos taken at 23:47 on 29 March.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lubbock Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass in the street, 30th March
item.description:
Glass in the street on the westbound side of Stanhope Gardens at the junction of Gloucester Road 6.30pm Saturday

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119-121, Gloucester Road, Brompton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken Slab, 30th March
item.description:
Going from Pont Street into Lennox Gardens, the slab has sunk, so the edge of the brick is exposed - ready to puncture a tyre! Apologies for the poor photo - it's worse than it looks from this angle!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennox Gardens, Chelsea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residents have been trying to get a replacement tree planted here, 29th March
item.description:
This tree is dead. Can it be removed and noted for replanting asap, this season if possible with a suitable replacement tree?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldermary Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed at 222 Brixton road on a black shutter. The wording says 'home', 29th March
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed on a black shutter at 222 Brixton road SW9. The graffiti is in white spray paint against a black gloss shutter. The wording spells 'Home' The graffiti has been there for approximately two weeks. Please can it be removed. It be very much appreciated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 226A, Brixton Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris in carriageway, 29th March
item.description:
Broken pavement has led to rocks and debris being in carriageway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hilgrove Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow barriers on pavement, 29th March
item.description:
They have been left after workmen have concreted the pavement. They have been there over six weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): May's Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shelving cabinet Albatross Way, 29th March
item.description:
Shelving cabinet by Albatross Way bike rack.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albatross Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pipe left in our front yard, 29th March
item.description:
What looks like a large drain pipe has been left in our front yard. It was in the road earlier in the week and now been dumped in our property. Not sure if fly tipped, or fell during wind and hail last week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inconsiderate parking and damage to verge and pavement, 29th March
item.description:
The people who live at 89 constantly are driving over the public dropped kerb at the corner of Eden Park Ave and Birchwood Ave and driving onto the grass verge. This is becoming dangerous, they drive onto the verge forward and then reverse back onto Birchwood Ave. They are causing damage to the public dropped kerb and grass verge. Please fit posts to stop them doing this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside 1 powerscroft rd, e5, 29th March
item.description:
A whole load of flytipping and rubbish situated around the base of a tree outside 1 Powerscroft Rd, E5 (near Harris Electrical Shop)
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powerscroft Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste wood dumped on Frederick Place - Burrage Road junction, 29th March
item.description:
Photos taken 28th March 2026; a fly tipping hot spot!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken mirror dumped on corner of The Oaks - Burrage Road, 29th March
item.description:
Photo taken 29th March 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This vehicle has flat tyres and has been parked in residents carpark bay for 3 months now, it appears to be abandoned., 29th March
item.description:
This silver/grey Hyundai car appears to be abandoned. The tyres are flat and it has been parked in the residents bay for 3 months now. The vehicle is parked in the carpark opposite the garages on the right.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on pavement, 29th March
item.description:
Flytipping is happening at the pavement in front Milford mews. A old woman is dumping a black bag with Corex board and paint material

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sensor on traffic light, 29th March
item.description:
I have been working in the Charlton area for close to six months now and the traffic light on Bugsby’s way that you can right turn into Asda petrol garage at I believe the sensor is broken that picks up cars waiting. The reason I think this is traffic builds all the way back waiting to turn and the light only ever changes after 5-6 minutes letting traffic constantly flow from other directions this is causing people to go through a red light which is obviously a safety concern in itself I feel like this needs to be looked into
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bugsby's Way, Charlton Riverside, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle with false number plate, no longer registered with DVLA, 29th March
item.description:
MOT history indicates the registration number KO04 KBE was for a Vauxhall Meriva, MOT expired since Feb 2016, but this vehicle is a Nissan Micra. Checking DVLA's site indicates the registration not found, hence not taxed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fearon Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spillage in Bournewood Road, 29th March
item.description:
Spillage of various matters needs clearing roadside outside house number 1A Bournewood Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haydens Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The mini van has been parked in the car park used for residents for more than 6 months now., 29th March
item.description:
The Mini van has been parked in the car park for more than 6 months now, it's parked in a bay, that is used by residents infront of the gates in the car park located next to the recycling bin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th March
item.description:
Construction waist storage dangerously can fall and injur somebody, Construction waist blocking footpath, BOSTALL LANE 31

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Lane, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet
